title: sphaerostephanos micropinnatus
intro: Sphaerostephanos micropinnatus, also known as the Micropinnate Sphaerostephanos, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Southeast Asian medicine, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Sphaerostephanos micropinnatus include the ability to reduce fever, treat skin infections, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared as a decoction, tea, or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal remedies in the region.
